message:
feat(dashboard): add command, env vars, and tailscale toggle to Create VM modal

The Create VM dialog now supports additional options that were previously
only available via CLI:

- Command field: specify the command to run in the VM (space-separated)
- Environment variables: dynamic add/remove key-value pairs
- Skip Tailscale toggle: opt out of joining the tailnet

Updated the full request chain from frontend through adapter to daemon.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
